completed_slices.summary: Hardened parallel scheduling so batches collect every worker result before returning, cancel active siblings gracefully on layer failure/cancellation, record deterministic layer outcomes, expose parallel layer state in status/monitor output, and document the invariant.
public_interfaces_changed: RunProgress status JSON now includes progress.parallel_layer and progress.parallel_slices for active parallel worker layers.
monitor/watch output now renders a Parallel layer line when a parallel worker layer is active.
acceptance_status: Parallel batches now receive worker results through a channel and join every spawned thread before returning.
Parallel layer failure records deterministic per-slice outcomes in state/events before failing or blocking the run.
Run cancellation and sibling layer failure propagate cancellation to active batch workers before the layer returns.
Status/monitor/watch expose active parallel layers via progress.parallel_layer, progress.parallel_slices, and rendered Parallel layer text.
Added daemon integration coverage for a failing worker with a still-running sibling, proving cancellation/join/outcome recording.
Integration still happens only after run_worker_layer returns all outcomes successfully; failed layers return before any merge.
assumptions: On sibling failure, still-running parallel workers should be cancelled gracefully and recorded as cancelled; completed siblings remain ready_to_merge but are not integrated unless the whole layer succeeds.

integration_repair.summary: Integration repair pass found no cross-slice or verification breakage; worktree remains clean.

findings.description: All quick integration checks passed; no repair commit needed.
